---
title: "News"
subtitle: "Announcements, milestones, and updates from BioMIND"
description: "Latest news from the BioMIND research cluster at UCF."
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 20
page-layout: full
---

The news feed tracks BioMIND announcements, paper releases, talks, and other milestones across the cluster's labs.

::: {.bm-callout}
**Adding a news post.** Create a new `.qmd` file in `news/posts/`, name it `YYYY-MM-short-slug.qmd`, and include front matter with `title`, `date`, `description`, and optional `categories`. See the existing posts for the format. The listing on this page updates automatically.
:::
